title: lens verdict
description: One adversarial review lens's structured verdict. DERIVE-AND-CHECK: the workflow derives the overall from the findings (any `blocking` finding rejects) and rejects a verdict whose asserted overall disagrees — consistency is checked, never trusted. A rejection requires a reject_reason AND at least one blocking finding to substantiate it.

findings.description: Concrete findings only: a constructed failure scenario or quoted evidence, never a vibe. Empty means the lens hunted and found nothing.

severity.description: blocking forces the derived verdict to reject; advisory is recorded evidence.

evidence.description: File/line, concrete scenario, or quoted diff demonstrating the finding.

overall.description: Must agree with what the findings derive: reject iff any blocking finding.

reject_reason.description: Required when overall is reject: the one-line substance of the rejection.
